description: Hold a comprehensive agent meeting to review all progress since launch. Steps: (1) Analyst collects all metrics — posts published, engagement rates, follower growth for EN (@meruru_tcbn). (2) Scout runs fresh data collection and competitive benchmarking. (3) Strategist evaluates progress vs goals, identifies what's working/not working, proposes improvement plan and next strategy. (4) Marc synthesizes everything into a meeting report with: progress summary, performance analysis, competitive benchmarking, improvement plan, next strategy, and action items. Output: data/agent_meeting_20260310.json → HTML report → send via Telegram. Only EN account is active (JP suspended). Check data/ for all existing metrics, outbound logs, content plans, and strategy files from previous days (20260307-20260310).
notes: Operator wants a thorough review — is real progress being made? How to achieve goals faster? Include concrete numbers and honest assessment. Check all historical data files in data/ directory for the full picture.
